site.title: Toolbox | Practical Online Tools
site.subtitle: Practical and convenient online tool collection
site.footer: ✨ This website and mini-program are intelligently generated by Kimi.ai 🤖

timestamp-converter.name: Timestamp Converter
timestamp-converter.description: Convert between Unix timestamp and datetime

color-picker.name: Color Picker
color-picker.description: Color selection and conversion tool, supports HEX, RGB, HSL

base64-tool.name: Base64 Encoder/Decoder
base64-tool.description: Base64 encoding and decoding tool, supports text conversion

json-formatter.name: JSON Formatter
json-formatter.description: JSON formatting, beautification and compression tool

remove-background.name: Background Remover
remove-background.description: Smart image background removal tool, supports white/solid color removal, local processing for privacy

base64.title: 🔐 Base64 Encoder/Decoder
base64.subtitle: Base64 encoding and decoding tool, supports text and file conversion

input.label: Input Content
input.placeholder: Enter content to encode or decode...

encode.title: Encoding Info
encode.content: Base64 encoding converts binary data to ASCII strings, commonly used for data transmission and storage

warning.title: Note
warning.content: Input must be a valid Base64 string for decoding, otherwise an error will be shown

colorPicker.title: 🎨 Color Picker
colorPicker.subtitle: Color selection and conversion tool, supports HEX, RGB, HSL conversion and color harmony generation

usage.title: 💡 Tips
usage.content: Click colors in harmonies to quickly apply them, supports HEX, RGB, HSL format conversion

harmony.title: 🎨 Color Harmonies
harmony.content: Complementary, triadic, analogous schemes to help you create beautiful color palettes quickly

storage.title: 💾 Local Storage
storage.content: Saved colors are stored locally in your browser for later use and can be cleared anytime

jsonFormatter.title: 📋 JSON Formatter
jsonFormatter.subtitle: JSON formatting, beautification and compression tool with syntax validation

tips.tip1Desc: Use Ctrl+V shortcut to paste JSON content directly for quick formatting
tips.tip2Desc: Automatically detects JSON syntax errors and pinpoints exact issue locations
tips.tip3Desc: All processing is done locally in your browser, data is never uploaded to servers

timestampConverter.title: ⏰ Timestamp Converter
timestampConverter.subtitle: Convert between Unix timestamp and datetime

what.title: 💡 What is a Timestamp
what.content: Unix timestamp is the number of seconds or milliseconds since January 1, 1970 UTC

auto.title: 🔄 Auto Detection
auto.content: System automatically detects seconds (10 digits) and milliseconds (13 digits) timestamps

shortcut.title: ⚡ Quick Action
shortcut.content: Click "Now" button to quickly fill in the current timestamp

removeBackground.title: 🎨 Background Remover Pro
removeBackground.subtitle: Smart white/solid color background removal with perfect clipboard support

usage.title: 💡 Tips
usage.content: If background removal is incomplete, try increasing the "Color Tolerance" value (suggested 20-50)

formats.title: 🎨 Supported Formats
formats.content: Supports JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP and other common formats, outputs transparent PNG

privacy.title: ✨ Privacy Protection
privacy.content: All processing is done locally in your browser, images are never uploaded to servers

toast.noImage: ⚠️ No image in clipboard, use Ctrl+V
toast.uploadFirst: Please upload or paste an image first
toast.pickColorHint: 🎨 Click original image to pick color, press ESC to cancel
